meaning: 浙江(位于中国东部沿海)
examples: Fujian is bounded on the north by Zhejiang.
Born in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, Ma grew up as a happy kid.
He is a fourth grade primary school student in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province.
Well, power rationing in Zhejiang province is bound to reduce demand from copper fabricators.
More often than not, they had gotten their lower quotes from companies in Zhejiang province.
